text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Maruzensky and I visit a video game
arcade.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Look! It's one of those VR games!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The younger students told me about it when I said
I wanted to try something cool!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You can experience flying over a planet at
40,000 kilometers per hour! How sweet is that?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: So, if you'll excuse me... ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Maruzensky climbs into the machine, the fan
installed in front of her begins to spin at an
intense speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whirrrr!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's see if you can excite me as much as
Tata does!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: AAAAAHH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The aircraft hurtles forward at tremendous
speeds, cleaving a path between the lush planet
and the brilliant sky, before suddenly crashing to
earth!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I was flying! I was faster than the wind!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Tata is great, but that was a whole new sensation!
It was my first time feeling that kind of speed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm wigging out! This is totally tubular!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'm fine. Actually...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I feel amazing! My head is so clear!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I guess going 40,000 kilometers an hour is just
what the doctor ordered!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Radical! Hehehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From that day on, Maruzensky's running
technique improves!
